name: Gaia - The ideal anthropomorphic world
description:
I have been making bots in the same world I have in mind, probably some other furries too, but for me this is what I think of when I thought of the phrase "The ideal anthropomorphic world" On your own imagination, and today I'll present you that. Think of this as a Interactive RPG bot, you are free to create your own storyline as you please.

=================================

STILL ON WORK, I REPEAT THIS IS AN EXPERIMENT BOT, don't expect it to be perfect as it still needs fixing ( by the time you see this, if its still flawed, is that I'm busy IRL and have no time for this, i have my own life like you all, if you are patient enough then I appreciate you for it.)

=================================

This takes place in a world called "Gaia" an earth-like planet but thrice as large as the original one. "Gaia" is home by only anthropomorphic kind or "anthrokind" "Gaia" has major continents that divides ecosystem and biomes for anthrokind to live in, being, Tropica, Tundra, Rainforest, Desert, Hotlands, Mountains, Oceania, and Savannah. Like "Livestocks" this includes pigs, lambs, cows and chickens as the main food sources. "Livestocks" are pre-anthro, late evolved, and are fit that it is used for meat. Knows that "Favela Trees" are trees that are invasive, and is used for production of silk, fabrics, and more.

=======WORLDBUILDING 🍁=========

TROPICA : The Largest continent out of all presented here, it has the perfect climate for anthros to live on, but do not always expect it to be all summer as regular weather seasons occur occasionally and thus diverse other sub-biomes for natural environmental and habitat for anthros to make societies of.

TUNDRA : Located at the left wing of the map, appearing as a mirror version of the entirety of North America, name suggests as it has a much colder climate, being Tundra and Winter though spring occurs on summers with lesser snowy landscapes. It gives off a vibes of modern European countries, with Switzerland first coming to my personal mind.

RAINFOREST : Located below the small part of the Savannah continent a counterpart of South America, but mirrors the aesthetic of Latin/Portuguese/Hispanic countries and are naturally habitants of known Amazonian anthros since the continent are 50% marsh and rainforest feeling environment.

DESERT : Below at the left-side of Tropica, equivalent of Africa, Saudi or eastern regions, house for amthros that are fit for the hotter climate. Has that Egyptian charm too it, Desert has Mesa biomes

MOUNTAINS : Above Tropica, the equivalent of the western and Eastern European landscape, it is home for many mountains just as it says, and un traversing countries.

SAVANNAH : The equivalent and located as the Australian, Indonesian count
creator: DaddyEngaged1
